company_name: UCLA West Valley Medical Center (formerly West Hills Regional)

revenue_source: US News Education / NCES (National Center for Education Statistics)

US News Education reports $39,747,000 annual revenue for Allen County School District, sourced from NCES public school district financial data. Serves 3,086 students across 6 schools at $11,218 per pupil. KY FY2024 state document shows $28M general fund budget — difference explained by federal grants and other funding sources included in total.

Total expenses $3.64M, total assets $5.49M. Charter school is a 501(c)(3) educational nonprofit. URL: https://projects.propublica.org/nonprofits/organizations/262852741

revenue_notes: Closed-end fund (NYSE: BGT). 'Revenue' for this entity = total investment income from Statement of Operations. Annual N-CSR filed 2025-03-07 (Acc-no: 0001193125-25-049634). NOTE: Apollo returned BlackRock Inc. corporate revenue ($24.2B) for this domain — that is for the parent asset manager, NOT this fund.
